title: Federal Aviation Administration
description: For a timely response to your question or concern, use the following contact information to find a point of contact or report an issue.
text:
Contact Us
For a timely response to your question or concern, use the following contact information to find a point of contact or report an issue.
Safety and Operations: Want to learn more about issues in aviation?
Report a Laser Incident
Find FAA Orders and Notices and Advisory Circulars
Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS): Want to learn more about UAS or drones?
Read information about Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS)
For questions about UAS please visit our UAS FAQ webpage
Contact the UAS Support Center
FAA Locations: Looking for an office?
Find your local Flight Standards District Office or other offices
Find additional information about FAA locations
FAA Hotline: Help prevent aviation safety issues and violations
Report unsafe and unauthorized aviation activity that violates an FAA regulation, order, or any other provision of Federal law related to aviation safety.
Report fraud, waste, abuse, or misconduct related to FAA programs, personnel, organizations, or facilities related to FAA programs or personnel.
Report incidents of alleged misconduct by a designee that casts doubt on the designee’s judgment, integrity, or character.
Report suspected unapproved parts
Learn about the FAA's "AIR 21" Whistleblower Protection Program.
Noise: Have a Noise Concern?
Learn about our efforts to reduce noise impacts and Aircraft Noise Issues
Visit the ANCIR Portal to file a noise complaint or inquiry
Learn about how the FAA is Responding to the Nation’s Aviation Noise Concerns
Freedom of Information Act (FOIA): Seeking public records and information?
FOIA gives individuals the right to access information from the Federal Government. Visit the FOIA website to learn how to
File a FOIA request
View the FAA's FOIA library
Contact a FOIA Coordinator
Consumer Protection: Experienced an issue with airline service?
Visit the Department of Transportation's Aviation Consumer Protection Division in order to
Report a concern about airline service, including:
Lost or damaged baggage
Baggage fees
Ticketing
Denied boarding
Flight delays
Aircraft disinfection
Customer service (refunds, travel with children or pets)
Discrimination
View Air Travel Consumer Reports
Learn about the rights of air travel passengers
Airport Security: Need to report a transportation security issue?
Contact the Transportation Security Administration's (TSA) online help center or call 866-289-9673 to
Submit a complaint or report about:
TSA screening technologies and/or processes
Missing or damaged items
Permitted or prohibited items
Report security concerns, such as instances of aviation security violations
Ask questions about the TSA Screening Process
Cell Towers: See a light outage?
Contact the Federal Communications Commission's Public Safety Support Center or call 202-418-1122 to report tower lighting outages.
Press Office: Media Inquiries
Media specialists review and respond to inquiries from 7 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET on weekdays and from 9 a.m. to 9 p.m. ET on weekends. Please email inquiries to pressoffice@faa.gov along with your deadline.
Additional Resources
Learn more about the Accountability Board
Explore our Frequently Asked Questions
Report technical issues with our website to the Web Manager. Please provide a detailed description of the issue and the URL of the page where you are experiencing the problem.
Still have a question or concern? Please call 866-TELL-FAA (866-835-5322) or, for TTY/TDD, use the Telecommunications Relay Service.
Last updated: Tuesday, June 3, 2025
